title: FUNC-SPRINT-78 — Changelog generator y política de cambios
tests: historical sprint documentation tests synchronized with README/backlog current milestone
pass_criteria: Changelog is human-readable and Keep a Changelog-compatible.
Changelog is generated from local manifests and includes traceability to sprint manifests.
Report writing is optional and restricted to outputs/reports.
No network, external API, publication, deployment, signing or Git tagging is performed.
README, runbook, Fase G backlog and functional backlog are synchronized.
block_criteria: Do not close if changelog invents changes not supported by manifests, commits or approved docs.
Do not close if CLI overwrites docs/release/CHANGELOG.md without governed confirmation.
Do not close if command depends on non-regenerable outputs.
Do not close if command calls network or external APIs.
Do not close if command publishes, deploys, signs or tags Git.

risks.mitigation: Generar desde manifests y reportar rango de sprints.
Bloquear cambios sin fuente local y documentar política.
CLI report-only; archivo canónico se mantiene por docs-as-code.
Documentar que packaging, SBOM, checksums y smoke release quedan para sprints posteriores.

next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-79 — Packaging Python y ZIP limpio reproducible
adr_rationale: No se requiere nueva ADR: FUNC-SPRINT-78 implementa una capacidad prevista por la ADR de release/versionado/productización y la política de release existentes; la política operacional específica queda en docs/05_operations/change_policy.md.
